name: Initialize Game State
description: Create state variables: snake (array of {x,y}), direction (string), food ({x,y}), score (number), gameOver (boolean), gridSize (number 20).

name: Create Game Board Component
description: Render a grid of 20x20 cells. Use snake state to color snake cells (head different), food cell, and empty cells.

name: Handle Keyboard Input
description: Add keydown listener. Map arrow keys to direction changes. Prevent reverse direction instantly.

name: Implement Game Loop
description: useEffect with setInterval (150ms). Move snake head in direction, remove tail (unless ate food), check collisions, update state.

name: Collision Detection
description: Check if new head position is out of grid bounds or hits any part of snake body → set gameOver to true.

name: Food Spawning Logic
description: When snake eats food (head matches food position), generate new random food on empty cell, increase length by 1, increase score.

name: Score & Restart Overlay
description: Display score above grid. When gameOver, show overlay with final score and restart button that resets state.

name: Mobile Swipe Support
description: Add touchstart/touchend listeners, calculate swipe direction, update direction state accordingly.

name: Style with Glassmorphism
description: Apply backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent backgrounds, border-radius, box-shadow, gradient accents to UI elements.

name: Responsive Layout
description: Use CSS Grid with min/max sizes, viewport units, media queries so board fits mobile screen without overflow.
